title: Careers at Tolemi
headline: Build the Future of Civic Tech
subheadline: Join a team that's helping local governments make smarter, data-driven decisions.
intro: At Tolemi, we believe that better data leads to better cities. We're a growing team of engineers, designers, and civic technologists working to transform how local governments manage their communities.
cultureBody: We're a remote-first team with flexible hours, generous PTO, and a commitment to professional growth. We celebrate diverse perspectives and believe the best solutions come from inclusive teams that reflect the communities we serve.

perks.title: Remote-First
perks.description: Work from anywhere in the US with flexible hours.

perks.title: Health & Wellness
perks.description: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage.

perks.title: Growth Budget
perks.description: Annual stipend for conferences, courses, and books.

perks.title: Generous PTO
perks.description: Unlimited vacation with a minimum of 3 weeks encouraged.

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Build and scale our core platform powering city data workflows. TypeScript, React, and Node.js.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Design intuitive interfaces that make complex civic data accessible to city staff and residents.

jobs.title: Account Executive
jobs.description: Help city leaders discover how Tolemi can solve their toughest data challenges.
